info.title: awesome-mcp REST Data Plane
info.description: Combined catalog of REST passthrough endpoints across every service wired into this awesome-mcp instance. Use the mintRestBearerForCurl MCP tool to mint a 5-minute bearer token, then GET these URLs to fetch bulk responses directly to disk without burning LLM context.

get.description: Lists all calendars accessible to the authenticated user.
Lists events from a specified calendar within an optional date range.

parameters.name: calendarId
parameters.description: The calendar ID (use 'primary' for the user's primary calendar)

parameters.name: timeMin
parameters.description: Start of the time range (ISO 8601). Defaults to now.

parameters.name: timeMax
parameters.description: End of the time range (ISO 8601). Defaults to 30 days from now.

parameters.name: maxResults
parameters.description: Maximum number of events to return

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Free text search terms to find matching events

parameters.name: singleEvents
parameters.description: Whether to expand recurring events into instances

post.description: Creates a new event in the specified calendar.

parameters.name: calendarId
parameters.description: The calendar ID (use 'primary' for the user's primary calendar)

description.description: Description or notes for the event

timeZone.description: Time zone (e.g., 'America/New_York'). Defaults to calendar's time zone.

sendUpdates.description: Whether to send email notifications to attendees

get.description: Gets detailed information about a specific calendar event.

patch.description: Updates an existing calendar event. Only provided fields are changed; omitted fields are preserved.

startDateTime.description: New start time in ISO 8601 format

endDateTime.description: New end time in ISO 8601 format

timeZone.description: Time zone for the start/end times

sendUpdates.description: Whether to send email notifications to attendees

parameters.name: sendUpdates
parameters.description: Whether to send email notifications to attendees

get.description: Gets information about the currently authenticated ClickUp user.
Lists all workspaces (teams) accessible to the authenticated user.
Lists all spaces in a workspace.

post.description: Creates a new space in the specified workspace.

parameters.name: spaceId
parameters.description: The space ID (used as the parent workspace context)

get.description: Lists all folders in a space.

post.description: Creates a new folder in the specified space.

get.description: Lists all lists within a folder.

post.description: Creates a new list inside a folder.

content.description: The description content of the list

due_date.description: The due date of the list in Unix time (milliseconds)

get.description: Lists all lists in a space that are not inside a folder.

patch.description: Updates an existing list. Only provided fields are changed.

content.description: New description content for the list

get.description: Lists tasks in a list with optional filtering and pagination.

parameters.name: statuses
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of statuses to filter by

post.description: Creates a new task in the specified list.

assignees.description: Array of user IDs to assign to the task

due_date.description: The due date in Unix time (milliseconds)

get.description: Gets detailed information about a specific task.

patch.description: Updates an existing task. Only provided fields are changed.

post.description: Moves a task to a different list.

get.description: Gets the members assigned to a specific task.
Searches for tasks across a workspace.
Gets all comments on a task.

post.summary: Add a comment to a task
post.description: Adds a new comment to a task.

comment_text.description: The text content of the comment

assignee.description: User ID to assign in the comment

get.description: Lists all docs in a workspace.
Searches for docs in a workspace.
Gets time tracking entries for a workspace within a date range.

parameters.name: assignee
parameters.description: User ID to filter time entries by

post.description: Starts a new time tracking entry.

tid.description: The task ID to track time for

billable.description: Whether the time entry is billable

post.description: Stops the currently running time tracking entry.
Reads the content of a Google Document. Returns plain text by default.

documentId.description: The ID of the Google Document (from the URL)

format.description: Output format: 'text' for plain text, 'json' for raw structure

maxLength.description: Maximum character limit for output. Omit for full content.

tabId.description: Optional tab ID to read a specific tab

format.description: The format of the returned content

content.description: The document content (string for text format, object for json format)

length.description: Length of the content in characters (for text format)

401.description: Unauthorized - invalid or missing API key

get.summary: List all comments in a document
get.description: Returns all comments in a Google Document, including replies.

parameters.name: documentId
parameters.description: The ID of the Google Document

post.summary: Add a comment to a document
post.description: Adds a comment to a Google Document with quoted text context. The comment will appear in the Comments panel.

parameters.name: documentId
parameters.description: The ID of the Google Document

startIndex.description: The starting index of the text range (inclusive, 1-based)

endIndex.description: The ending index of the text range (exclusive)

get.description: Gets metadata for a specific file in Google Drive.

delete.description: Deletes a file from Google Drive. By default moves to trash unless permanent is true.

parameters.name: permanent
parameters.description: Whether to permanently delete the file instead of moving to trash

post.description: Creates a copy of a file in Google Drive.

newName.description: Name for the copied file. Defaults to 'Copy of <original name>'.

parentFolderId.description: Folder ID to place the copy in. Defaults to the same folder as the original.

get.description: Lists files and subfolders within a specified folder.

parameters.name: folderId
parameters.description: The folder ID (use 'root' for the root folder)

parameters.name: maxResults
parameters.description: Maximum number of items to return

post.description: Creates a new folder in Google Drive.

parentFolderId.description: Parent folder ID. Defaults to the root folder.

get.description: Searches for emails matching the specified query using Gmail search syntax.

parameters.name: maxResults
parameters.description: Maximum number of messages to return

parameters.name: pageToken
parameters.description: Token for retrieving the next page of results

nextPageToken.description: Token for the next page of results

get.description: Gets the full content of a specific email message.

parameters.name: format
parameters.description: The format to return the message in

patch.description: Adds or removes labels from a message (e.g., mark as read, archive, star).

delete.description: Moves an email message to the trash.

post.description: Sends a new email message.

to.description: Recipient email address(es), comma-separated for multiple

cc.description: CC recipient email address(es), comma-separated for multiple

bcc.description: BCC recipient email address(es), comma-separated for multiple

isHtml.description: Whether the body content is HTML

threadId.description: Thread ID of the sent message

400.description: Bad request - missing required fields or invalid email

post.description: Creates a new draft email message.

to.description: Recipient email address(es), comma-separated for multiple

cc.description: CC recipient email address(es), comma-separated for multiple

bcc.description: BCC recipient email address(es), comma-separated for multiple

isHtml.description: Whether the body content is HTML

400.description: Bad request - missing required fields or invalid email

get.description: Lists spreadsheets accessible to the authenticated user.

parameters.name: maxResults
parameters.description: Maximum number of spreadsheets to return

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Search query to filter spreadsheets by name

get.description: Gets metadata and sheet information for a specific spreadsheet.

post.summary: Read a range from a spreadsheet
post.description: Reads cell values from a specified range in the spreadsheet.

range.description: The A1 notation range to read (e.g., 'Sheet1!A1:D10')

post.summary: Write to a range in a spreadsheet
post.description: Writes cell values to a specified range in the spreadsheet.

range.description: The A1 notation range to write to (e.g., 'Sheet1!A1:D10')

values.description: 2D array of cell values to write

valueInputOption.description: How input data should be interpreted (RAW or USER_ENTERED)

400.description: Bad request - invalid range or values

post.description: Appends rows of data after the last row with content in the specified range.

range.description: The A1 notation of the range to search for data to append after (e.g., 'Sheet1!A:D')

values.description: 2D array of row values to append

valueInputOption.description: How input data should be interpreted (RAW or USER_ENTERED)

400.description: Bad request - invalid range or values

post.description: Creates a new Google Slides presentation with the specified title.

title.description: The title of the new presentation

get.description: Gets detailed information about a Google Slides presentation, including its slides.

parameters.name: presentationId
parameters.description: The ID of the presentation to retrieve

get.description: Gets detailed information about a specific page (slide) in a presentation.

parameters.name: pageObjectId
parameters.description: The object ID of the page (slide) to retrieve

post.description: Applies one or more updates to a presentation. Each request is validated before being applied. If any request is not valid, the entire request will fail.

parameters.name: presentationId
parameters.description: The ID of the presentation to update

items.description: A single update request (e.g., createSlide, insertText, deleteObject, replaceAllText)

requests.description: A list of updates to apply to the presentation

presentationId.description: The ID of the updated presentation

replies.description: The reply of each request in the same order

get.description: List Google Docs. Mirrors the MCP tool `listGoogleDocs`. Returns upstream JSON by default; pass Accept: text/plain for markdown.

200.description: Success (raw upstream JSON or rendered text)

get.description: Recent Google Docs. Mirrors the MCP tool `getRecentGoogleDocs`. Returns upstream JSON by default; pass Accept: text/plain for markdown.

200.description: Success (raw upstream JSON or rendered text)

get.summary: Read a Google Doc (JSON or text via Accept)
get.description: Read a Google Doc (JSON or text via Accept). Mirrors the MCP tool `readGoogleDoc`. Returns upstream JSON by default; pass Accept: text/plain for markdown.

200.description: Success (raw upstream JSON or rendered text)

get.summary: List tabs in a Google Doc
get.description: List tabs in a Google Doc. Mirrors the MCP tool `listDocumentTabs`. Returns upstream JSON by default; pass Accept: text/plain for markdown.

200.description: Success (raw upstream JSON or rendered text)

200.description: Success (raw upstream JSON or rendered text)

200.description: Success (raw upstream JSON or rendered text)

get.description: Check if a file is publicly accessible. Mirrors the MCP tool `checkPublicAccess`. Returns upstream JSON by default; pass Accept: text/plain for markdown.

200.description: Success (raw upstream JSON or rendered text)

get.description: Download or export a file. Mirrors the MCP tool `downloadDriveFile`. Returns upstream JSON by default; pass Accept: text/plain for markdown.

200.description: Success (raw upstream JSON or rendered text)

get.description: Get folder metadata. Mirrors the MCP tool `getFolderInfo`. Returns upstream JSON by default; pass Accept: text/plain for markdown.

200.description: Success (raw upstream JSON or rendered text)

200.description: Success (raw upstream JSON or rendered text)

get.description: Download an email attachment. Mirrors the MCP tool `getAttachment`. Returns upstream JSON by default; pass Accept: text/plain for markdown.

200.description: Success (raw upstream JSON or rendered text)

200.description: Success (raw upstream JSON or rendered text)

get.description: List comments on a presentation. Mirrors the MCP tool `listPresentationComments`. Returns upstream JSON by default; pass Accept: text/plain for markdown.

200.description: Success (raw upstream JSON or rendered text)

get.description: List accessible custom fields on a list. Mirrors the MCP tool `getAccessibleCustomFields`. Returns upstream JSON by default; pass Accept: text/plain for markdown.

200.description: Success (raw upstream JSON or rendered text)

get.description: Get a ClickUp doc with its pages. Mirrors the MCP tool `getDoc`. Returns upstream JSON by default; pass Accept: text/plain for markdown.

200.description: Success (raw upstream JSON or rendered text)

get.summary: Get a page within a ClickUp doc
get.description: Get a page within a ClickUp doc. Mirrors the MCP tool `getPage`. Returns upstream JSON by default; pass Accept: text/plain for markdown.

200.description: Success (raw upstream JSON or rendered text)

200.description: Success (raw upstream JSON or rendered text)

get.description: Read recent messages in a channel. Mirrors the MCP tool `readChannelHistory`. Returns upstream JSON by default; pass Accept: text/plain for markdown.

200.description: Success (raw upstream JSON or rendered text)

get.description: List Slack workspace users. Mirrors the MCP tool `listUsers`. Returns upstream JSON by default; pass Accept: text/plain for markdown.

200.description: Success (raw upstream JSON or rendered text)

bearerAuth.description: Bearer token from the mintRestBearerForCurl MCP tool (5-minute TTL) or a permanent dashboard API key.

primary.description: Whether this is the user's primary calendar

accessRole.description: The effective access role (owner, writer, reader, freeBusyReader)

start.description: Start time (ISO 8601 dateTime or date for all-day events)

end.description: End time (ISO 8601 dateTime or date for all-day events)

status.description: Status of the event (confirmed, tentative, cancelled)

htmlLink.description: URL link to the event in Google Calendar

profilePicture.description: URL of the user's profile picture

task_count.description: Number of tasks in the list

due_date.description: The due date in Unix time (milliseconds)

url.description: URL to the task in ClickUp

list.description: The list the task belongs to

date_updated.description: Last update date in Unix time (milliseconds)

profilePicture.description: URL of the member's profile picture

comment_text.description: The text content of the comment

user.description: The user who posted the comment

date.description: The date the comment was created in Unix time (milliseconds)

workspace_id.description: The workspace the doc belongs to

task.description: The task associated with this time entry

user.description: The user who tracked the time

billable.description: Whether the time entry is billable

quotedText.description: The text that the comment is anchored to

author.description: Display name of the comment author

resolved.description: Whether the comment has been resolved

author.description: Display name of the reply author

size.description: Size of the file in bytes

modifiedTime.description: When the file was last modified

webViewLink.description: Link to open the file in a browser

threadId.description: Thread ID the message belongs to

snippet.description: Short snippet of the message body

threadId.description: Thread ID the message belongs to

snippet.description: Short snippet of the message body

size.description: Size of the attachment in bytes

modifiedTime.description: When the spreadsheet was last modified

sheets.description: List of sheets in the spreadsheet

index.description: The index of the sheet within the spreadsheet

rowCount.description: Number of rows in the sheet

columnCount.description: Number of columns in the sheet

revisionId.description: The revision ID of the presentation

objectId.description: The object ID of the page

pageType.description: The type of the page (SLIDE, MASTER, LAYOUT)

pageElements.description: The page elements on this page

objectId.description: The object ID of the page element

size.description: The size of the page element

transform.description: The transform of the page element
